message:
web: Redesign landing page and add waitlist/admin features

- Redesign landing page to match opentab/diffs style with serif/mono fonts,
  dot pattern backgrounds, and hard-edged buttons with shadow effects
- Add animated SVG illustrations for each feature card
- Add user role system (waitlist/user/admin) with database migration
- Create waitlist success page for new signups
- Create admin dashboard with user stats, transcript counts, and costs
- Add admin link in navigation for admin users
- Remove Codex integration, keep Claude Code and OpenCode with icons
- Remove self-hosted section from landing page

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/b02b0663-2c35-4b2f-a136-7a37cdfcca5f
